author: y4rr
content: Probe-before-fix PASSED: 5 probes (vit_patch_embed_bcp_to_bpc, convnext_nhwc_from_nchw, convnext_nchw_from_nhwc, swin_bchw_to_bhwc_flat, swin_bhwc_to_bchw_flat) all produce byte-identical output between manual data_vec loop and Tensor::permute().contiguous() chain. Safe to migrate. Probe lives at ferrotorch-vision/tests/probe_permute_migration.rs and stays in the repo as a regression net.
